chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 4753 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ (Priority). 1. For hearing on CMA No. 19463/21 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. -------------- 08.10.2024. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Ms. Zakia Jatoi, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, Advocate for Respondents. ---------- None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing when the matter was adjourned. Today, again nobody has turned up to assist the Court, which reflects that the Petitioner is not interested. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
